meta.title: openclaWP
meta.description: An agent that lives inside your WordPress site — chat block, REST endpoints, workflows, channels. Demo runs entirely in your browser with a canned runner; swap in any AI provider after the demo.
meta.author: lezama

steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $dir = WP_PLUGIN_DIR; $targets = ['agents-api.php' => 'agents-api', 'openclawp.php' => 'openclawp']; foreach ( (array) glob( $dir . '/*' ) as $candidate ) { if ( ! is_dir( $candidate ) ) continue; foreach ( $targets as $main => $slug ) { if ( file_exists( $candidate . '/' . $main ) && basename( $candidate ) !== $slug ) { rename( $candidate, $dir . '/' . $slug ); echo basename( $candidate ) . ' -> ' . $slug . "\n"; break; } } }

steps.command: wp post create --post_type=post --post_status=publish --post_title='Hello from openclaWP' --post_content='Demo post for the example agent to read. Try asking the chat what your latest post is.'

options.blogdescription: Agent inside the site — no install, no key.
